use rayon::ThreadPoolBuilder;

// BAD: custom pool created per call
fn process_batch(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    let pool = ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
        .num_threads(4)
        .build()
        .unwrap();

    pool.install(|| {
        items.par_iter()
            .map(|item| transform(item))
            .collect()
    })
}

fn analyze_dataset(data: &[f64]) -> Stats {
    let pool = ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
        .num_threads(8)
        .build()
        .unwrap();

    pool.install(|| {
        let mean = data.par_iter().sum::<f64>() / data.len() as f64;
        let variance = data.par_iter()
            .map(|x| (x - mean).powi(2))
            .sum::<f64>() / data.len() as f64;
        Stats { mean, variance }
    })
}
